text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Repeated modifications to the HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings\\Connections registry key and frequent connections to local port 5985 (WinRM), combined with repeated loading of wmidcom.dll and dpapi.dll, suggest unusual or potentially malicious activity for svchost.exe. This behavior could indicate an attempt to establish or re-establish network communication or persistence.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost.exe",
    "reg_create",
    "HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings\\Connections",
    "connect",
    "5985",
    "wmidcom.dll",
    "dpapi.dll",
    "repeated activity"
  ]
}
